ohtani.title: Freeman, Ohtani each drive in a pair in Dodgers' win
ohtani.blurb: Freddie Freeman crushes a two-run homer and Shohei Ohtani hits a two-run triple in the Dodgers' 6-5 win over the D-backs

imanaga.title: Velázquez, Saggese and Herrera power Cardinals to win
imanaga.blurb: Nelson Velázquez, Thomas Saggese and Iván Herrera each homered as the Cardinals' bullpen tossed six innings of one-run ball in a 6-5 win

suzuki.title: Gage Jump, Nick Kurtz lead Athletics to 2-1 win
suzuki.blurb: Gage Jump pitches seven innings of one-run ball to earn his first career win and Nick Kurtz homers to lead the A's to a win over the Cubs

yoshida.title: Pete Alonso, Coby Mayo's homers lead Orioles' 4-2 win
yoshida.blurb: Pete Alonso and Coby Mayo lead the Orioles' offense with home runs and Shane Baz throws seven innings in the team's 4-2 win over the Red Sox

okamoto.title: Matt Olson hits a home run in Braves' win
okamoto.blurb: Matt Olson hits a solo home run and Bryce Elder strikes out six in the Braves' 4-3 win over the Blue Jays

murakami.title: Miguel Vargas hits a walk-off homer in White Sox win
murakami.blurb: Miguel Vargas hits a walk-off homer in the 10th inning and Rikuu Nishida collects his first RBI in the White Sox 4-3 win over the Tigers

matsui.title: Bryce Harper crushes a two-run homer in Phillies' win
matsui.blurb: Bryce Harper delivers a two-run home run and Aaron Nola strikes out eight in the Phillies' 3-2 win over the Padres
